headline: History of Medicine
description: Medicine's evolution: ancient (Hippocrates: disease natural not supernatural, ~400 BCE) → Galen (anatomy via animals, errors persisted 1500 years) → Vesalius (human dissection, 1543) → germ theory (Pasteur, Koch, 1860s-80s) → anesthesia (1846, Morton) → antiseptics (Lister, 1867) → antibiotics (Fleming: penicillin, 1928) → modern medicine.

citation.name: The Emperor of All Maladies (Siddhartha Mukherjee)
